Video.summary: Featuring Willie Mays' batting tips, Muhammad Ali, Sonny Liston, Joe Namath; the New York Jets win in Superbowl III, and more athletes.

Image.alt: Episode 1
Episode 1
Episode 1
Episode 1
Episode 1

Video.summary: Featuring some of the many athletes of color who broke barriers during a segregated time in the United States.

Video.summary: During its twenty-three year run, The Ed Sullivan Show embarked on numerous journeys around the world. In this episode, we will look at Ed Sullivan's bold excursions to political hotbeds around the world.
Video.grandparentTitle: On the Road With Ed Sullivan
Video.title: On the Road With Ed Sullivan

Image.alt: On the Road With Ed Sullivan
On the Road With Ed Sullivan
On the Road With Ed Sullivan
On the Road With Ed Sullivan
